summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Wine Brand Proposal landing page for WTF Agency presenting services to Grupo Comercial Grupo Upper Blanc. All major functionality working correctly with 100% backend success rate and 95% frontend success rate.
passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint returns correct message
Contact form submission saves data to MongoDB
Backend form validation returns 422 for missing fields
Get contacts endpoint returns proper list
Hero section displays WTF logo and 'GRUPO UPPER BLANC' text
Hero headline shows 'Desarrollo Integral Marca de Vinos para Brasil'
Hero pricing displays USD 7,500 monthly and USD 90,000 annual
All 5 navigation links functional (Fases, Inversión, Metodología, Timeline, Contacto)
All 3 phase cards clickable and display deliverables when selected
Investment section shows correct USD 7,500/month and USD 90,000/year pricing
Timeline section shows 12-month roadmap with 3 phases
Contact form submission works - form clears after success
Form validation shows toast notification for required fields
Success toast notification displays after form submission
